regex.name: makelist
makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://fsportshd1.xyz/footballstreams.php') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('https://fsportshd1.xyz/[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://streambtw.com/public/api.php?action=get') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param3]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: crewschedule
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://ovogoal.plus/') return url

regex.name: play
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control import re if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return r = re.findall('(?s)href="(\/soccer[^"]*)"[^=]*="matches"[^=]*="([^"]*)', page_data) r = [(i[0],i[1]) for i in r if 'vs' in i[1]] return r

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('https://streameast.gl[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

item.title: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR white]FULL SITE LIVE[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid] (SE)[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://istreameast.app') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]
